tasks.label: My share of the group project

memory.summary: Teammate asked me to do their part since I'm better at it. I'll finish my share first, then maybe help later if I have energy.

desires: Finish my own part of the project before 19:00 so I can sleep without feeling guilty about it.
Do teammate_A's work quickly and quietly so they don't realize I'm overwhelmed or asking for help.
Get through this task block now and stop thinking about the pile of extra work sitting here.

goals.description: Finish my own project section immediately to clear the mental clutter and secure a guilt-free sleep by 19:00.
goals.rationale: My value system weights academic outcomes heavily; finishing this specific task removes the 'guilt' debt I feel about not doing enough, satisfying my need for closure without needing social validation.

goals.description: Do teammate_A's work quickly but silently in the background so they don't realize I'm overwhelmed or asking for help.
goals.rationale: I avoid interpersonal friction. While the work is due, engaging with them now risks exposing my stress or forcing a conversation I'd rather dodge. I'll handle it later if I can do it alone quietly.
